title: Add debounce utility to timing-helpers.ts
description: Create debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(fn: T, delayMs: number): T in src/utils/timing-helpers.ts with co-located tests. This is a separate implementation from the existing debounce.ts, providing a simpler signature focused on basic trailing-edge debouncing.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - existing debounce implementation with options parameter for leading/trailing behavior
src/utils/throttle.ts - existing timing utility with similar structure
src/utils/debounce.test.ts - test patterns using vitest fake timers, beforeEach/afterEach for vi.useFakeTimers/vi.useRealTimers
